name: Wood Cookbook/Tablet Holder - Threshold™: Rubberwood Stand, Kitchen Storage, Hand Wash, Brown, 10.31" Height
description:
Cook with ease by using the Wood Cookbook/Tablet Holder from Threshold™. This natural-shade cookbook and tablet holder features an arched shape with an extended holder to help keep your cookbooks or tablets in place. Crafted from wood, it should be hand washed for easy maintenance after use.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
